allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Microsoft\\WinGet\\Links\\ffmpeg.exe", "C:\\ffmpeg\\bin\\ffmpeg.exe", "$env:ProgramFiles\\ffmpeg\\bin\\ffmpeg.exe"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p"; break } }; Get-Command winget -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Source)
